# Harinarayan Maniyanthara Rajesh

> Software engineer. Builds production-ready systems in Go — backend services, kiosk OSes, edge AI, computer vision. Maintains the noss RSS package for Debian. 9× hackathon winner.

## About

https://hari.laddu.cc — Personal portfolio and project showcase.

## Projects

- **SecureBox Vault**: Stateless kiosk OS with QEMU sandbox isolation and encrypted Cloudflare Tunnel transfers. Built to prevent sensitive data leakage.
- **Kesla**: EV dashboard OS booting in <3s on Raspberry Pi. 3D gesture navigation via MediaPipe. systemd-optimized Chromium kiosk.
- **Veekshan**: Natural-language search for surveillance footage. NLP-to-computer-vision pipeline running on local edge hardware.
- **Mishran**: Multi-camera live production system. Syncs phone video feeds, AI shot selection via n8n-orchestrated agents.
- **EyeTap**: Gaze-controlled interface using OpenCV/dlib at 30 FPS. Hands-free computer control via Android WebSocket streaming.

## Experience

- **Debian Project** (Oct 2025–Present): Package Maintainer for the noss RSS/Atom feed aggregator. Handles packaging, dependency updates, bug fixes, and security patches following Debian policy.

## Social

- GitHub: https://github.com/hxri-nxrxyxn
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/harinarayanmr
- Email: hari@laddu.cc

## Tech Stack

Go, PostgreSQL, Linux, Docker, Systemd, QEMU, SvelteKit, TensorFlow, MediaPipe, OpenCV, Raspberry Pi, MQTT, Git, CI/CD, Cloudflare Tunnels.
